prompt: O governo Lula declarou emergência humanitária na terra indígena Yanomami em 2023?
response:
**Yes, the Lula government declared a humanitarian emergency in the Yanomami Indigenous Territory in 2023.**

### Key Facts from Official and Reliable Sources
- **Date and Actions**: On January 20, 2023, President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva issued Decree nº 11.384/2023, creating the National Coordination Committee to Address Health Neglect in Yanomami Territory. This was coordinated by the Casa Civil and involved interministerial efforts ([gov.br sources 1, 2, 4](https://www.gov.br/planalto/pt-br/acompanhe-o-planalto/noticias/2023/01/governo-adota-acoes-emergenciais-em-socorro-aos-yanomami-vamos-dar-a-eles-a-dignidade-que-eles-merecem-diz-lula-em-boa-vista); [G1](https://g1.globo.com/jornal-nacional/noticia/2023/01/20/lula-convoca-acao-emergencial-interministerial-para-intervencao-na-area-indigena-yanomami.ghtml)).
- **Health Emergency Declaration**: The Ministry of Health, under Minister Nísia Trindade, declared a Public Health Emergency of National Importance (ESPIN) the same day, establishing the COE-Yanomami operations center for urgent response to malnutrition, mercury contamination, and diseases from illegal mining ([gov.br 1, 4](https://www.gov.br/planalto/pt-br/acompanhe-o-planalto/noticias/2023/01/governo-adota-acoes-emergenciais-em-socorro-aos-yanomami-vamos-dar-a-eles-a-dignidade-que-eles-merecem-diz-lula-em-boa-vista); [Agência Brasil](https://agenciabrasil.ebc.com.br/saude/noticia/2023-01/lula-determina-socorro-urgente-e-humanitario-aos-yanomami)).
- **Context and Lula's Statements**: Following a visit to Roraima, Lula described the crisis—marked by over 500 child deaths from malnutrition, mercury poisoning, and famine due to illegal garimpo (mining)—as "genocídio" and launched the largest emergency intervention in Brazil's biggest indigenous reserve ([G1 3, 6](https://g1.globo.com/jornal-nacional/noticia/2023/01/20/lula-convoca-acao-emergencial-interministerial-para-intervencao-na-area-indigena-yanomami.ghtml); [DW](https://www.dw.com/pt-br/o-raio-x-da-crise-yanomami-em-um-ano-de-emerg%C3%AAncia/a-68027716); [Correio Braziliense](https://www.correiobraziliense.com.br/brasil/2023/01/5067832-lula-visita-terra-ianomami-para-tratar-da-crise-humanitaria.html)).

### Outcomes and Follow-Up
- **Investments**: Over R$1 billion spent in 2023 on food distribution, medical aid, reopening 6 health bases (recovering 307 malnourished children), and garimpo removal. Health spending doubled to R$220+ million ([DW 5](https://www.dw.com/pt-br/o-raio-x-da-crise-yanomami-em-um-ano-de-emerg%C3%AAncia/a-68027716); [G1 6](https://g1.globo.com/meio-ambiente/noticia/2024/01/10/retorno-do-garimpo-desnutricao-avanco-da-malaria-e-mortes-o-raio-x-da-terra-yanomami-1-ano-apos-governo-lula-decretar-emergencia.ghtml); [gov.br 2](https://www.gov.br/secom/pt-br/acompanhe-a-secom/noticias/2026/01/protecao-e-construcao-de-um-novo-futuro-marcam-os-tres-anos-da-emergencia-yanomami)).
- **Transition**: By January 2024, emergency actions shifted to permanent ones, including a government house in Boa Vista, amid ongoing challenges like 308 deaths in 2023 (mostly children under 4) ([UOL 10](https://noticias.uol.com.br/ultimas-noticias/agencia-estado/2024/02/22/mortes-em-reserva-yanomami-sobem-um-ano-apos-lula-decretar-emerg
